\tzpentry{ID4500}{Unified Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4500 introduces Unified Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{unified}} = \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}} + \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{Furiene}}, \end{equation}
